name: HIGHWOODS PROPERTIES, INC.
summary: Highwoods Properties, Inc. is a publicly-traded, fully integrated office REIT headquartered in Raleigh, NC. The Company owns, develops, acquires, leases, and manages office properties primarily in the best business districts (BBDs) of Atlanta, Charlotte, Dallas, Nashville, Orlando, Raleigh, Richmond, and Tampa. Its primary business is the operation, acquisition, and development of office properties, aiming to generate attractive returns by owning high-quality, differentiated office buildings in BBDs of its core markets.
